response.original_title: Paw Patrol: Might Pups Super Paws
response.overview: When Mayor Humdinger's kittens get mighty powers, a super-thief steals Adventure Bay's treasures, and Harold puts the town under a deep freeze, it's up to the Mighty Pups and their new friends the Mighty Twins to save the day. Plus everyone gets a BIG surprise when Chickaletta gets mighty powers too!
response.title: Paw Patrol: Might Pups Super Paws
